'''âm-dh-l-z''' ('''kamadhlezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jolly|jolly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jolly|jolly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-dh-l-z
|-
! Lemma
| kamadhlezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimadhlezoko|thimadhlezoko]] || [[word:jimadhlezoko|jimadhlezoko]] || [[word:shimadhlezoko|shimadhlezoko]] || [[word:kimadhlezoko|kimadhlezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumadhlezoko|thuthumadhlezoko]] || [[word:jujumadhlezoko|jujumadhlezoko]] || [[word:shushumadhlezoko|shushumadhlezoko]] || [[word:kukumadhlezoko|kukumadhlezoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
